summary.summary: Refactor Fastfile capability handling: replaced per-missing-capability update_capability calls with create_capability in a single loop, removed code that set provisioning_request_client current_team_id only when capabilities were missing, and removed the post-update verification and UI.user_error! for still-missing capabilities. Also removed the USERNOTIFICATIONS_TIMESENSITIVE capability from one configure_bundle_id call. (See diff:9f312a9c315b and commit:3a93c28b5eff.)
summary.userFacingImpact: This is an internal Fastlane change affecting how App Store Connect bundle ID capabilities are created/managed during automation: missing capabilities are now created via create_capability instead of updated via update_capability, and the script no longer raises a user-facing error if capabilities remain missing after the operation. These changes affect CI/developer tooling behavior, not runtime app code; review of CI/automation that depends on capability creation is recommended. (See diff:9f312a9c315b, file:eea9d170fdf7.)
